EnterpriseSDK
Table of Contents

Interface ITemporalOperator

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.GeoDatabaseExtensions
Assembly
ESRI.Server.GeoDatabaseExtensions.dll

Provides access to methods and properties used to identify and manage temporal playback settings.

[Guid("56AE7150-7BFC-11D6-B84D-00010265ADC5")]
[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
public interface ITemporalOperator

Properties

AsDate

Temporal information as a date field.

object AsDate { get; }

Property Value

object

Sample Snippet

AsInterval[enumTemporalOperatorUnits]

Temporal information as an interval value.

Parameters

enumUnits enumTemporalOperatorUnits

object

Temporal information as a string.

bstrFormat string

string

Sample Snippet

IntervalQuantity

Number of intervals between events.

double IntervalQuantity { get; }

double

Sample Snippet

IntervalUnits

Units used for interval.

enumTemporalOperatorUnits IntervalUnits { get; }

Sample Snippet

Type

The type of temporal data used.

enumTemporalOperatorType Type { get; }

SetDateTime(int, short, short, short, short, short, short)

Sets the value for date and time information.

lYear int
lMonth short
lDayOfMonth short
lHour short
lMinute short
lSecond short
lMillisecond short

Examples

SetInterval(double, enumTemporalOperatorUnits)

Sets the playback time interval between events.

dQuantity double
enumUnits enumTemporalOperatorUnits
